Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

I can see that the `labelOff=" "` lines were already removed in a previous pass, leaving behind blank lines (lines 114, 136, 158). Let me clean those up as artifacts. Now let me reason through all three fixes:

**Fix 1 (Line 178):** `Button.variant` type changed — `'link'` is still a valid value in both old and new types. The value `ButtonVariant.link` is already correct. **No change needed.**

**Fix 2 (Lines 114, 136, 158):** `labelOff` already removed in a previous pass. The blank lines left behind are artifacts that should be cleaned up.

**Fix 3 (Line 177):** The Button already has `icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}` as a prop (line 179), with text children `{t('Add Rule to Rule List')}`. This is already the correct v6 pattern (icon in prop, text as children). **Already applied.**

Let me clean up the blank-line artifacts from Fix 2:
Let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks clean and correct. All three fixes are resolved.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed
**Already correct (no change needed).** The value `ButtonVariant.link` (`'link'`) is present in both the old and new type unions. No migration required.

### Fix 2 — `Switch.labelOff` removed
**Already applied in a previous pass (artifact cleanup only).** The `labelOff=" "` prop had already been removed from all three `<Switch>` instances (lines 114, 136, 158). The removal left behind blank lines, which were cleaned up in this pass (3 blank lines removed).

### Fix 3 — `Button` icon children to `icon` prop
**Already applied (no change needed).** The `<Button>` at line 174 already uses the correct v6 pattern: the icon is passed via the `icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}` prop (line 176), with only text as children (`{t('Add Rule to Rule List')}`).
